# matomo_custom_dimension (Resource)



## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "matomo_custom_dimension" "user_type" {
  site_id = matomo_site.main.id
  name    = "User Type"
  scope   = "visit"
  active  = true
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `index` (Number) The dimension's slot number within its scope. You choose this; Matomo does not support picking a slot on creation, so Create verifies the slot it assigns matches this value.
- `name` (String) The dimension's display name.
- `scope` (String) "visit" or "action".
- `site_id` (String) The owning site's id (matomo_site.x.id).

### Optional

- `active` (Boolean) Whether the dimension is active. Matomo has no delete API for custom dimensions; destroying this resource sets active=false rather than removing the slot.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Composite "site_id/scope/index".
